tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-cli-commands
tasks.task:
Fix all @typescript-eslint/explicit-function-return-type violations in the following files:
- src/cli/commands/analyze.ts
- src/cli/commands/curate.ts
- src/cli/commands/delete.ts
- src/cli/commands/fork.ts
- src/cli/commands/inspect.ts
- src/cli/commands/list.ts
- src/cli/commands/rename.ts
- src/cli/commands/resume.ts
- src/cli/commands/retrieve.ts
- src/cli/commands/rewind.ts
- src/cli/commands/run.ts
- src/cli/commands/show.ts
- src/cli/commands/start.ts
- src/cli/commands/survey.ts
- src/cli/commands/sweep.ts
- src/cli/commands/tag.ts

Add explicit return type annotations to all functions and arrow functions that are missing them. Use mcp__perclst__ts_analyze to inspect each file's structure and mcp__perclst__ts_get_types to confirm correct types. After editing, run `./node_modules/.bin/eslint src/cli/commands/` to verify no violations remain in these files.

tasks.command: npm run build && npm run test:unit

tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-cli-commands
tasks.task: Return types added and build/tests passing. Commit the changes with an appropriate conventional commit message (e.g. fix(lint): add explicit return types to cli/commands).
